[287] tool exec call: const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /tmp/cyspbot-oidc-issuers-pr.md\n+## Summary\n+\n+- introduce a GitHub Actions OIDC issuer adapter that owns issuer resolution, trusted verification configuration, principal derivation, and subject-token binding\n+- isolate Cloudflare bindings and infrastructure dependencies behind a request-scoped token-exchange runtime\n+- preserve the existing GitHub Actions authentication, policy, OAuth response, rate-limit, and installation-token issuance behavior\n+\n+## Impact\n+\n+This creates clean extension seams for future trusted OIDC issuers without mixing new provider behavior, generic policy changes, or structured-log changes into the refactoring. Unknown, malformed, unavailable, and declined issuers continue to fail before any JWKS request.\n+\n+## Validation\n+\n+- `node --run check` under Node.js 24\n+- 239 tests across 13 test files\n+- lockfile, formatting, generated bindings, lint, typecheck, Knip, and both Worker dry-runs\n+- two-axis standards and specification review with no remaining findings\n+- adversarial security diff review covering all 10 changed source files with no reportable findings\n*** End Patch";
const result = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
